summary: Improved matching for two functions in src/melee/lb/lbshadow.c: spline tangent handling in lbShadow_8000E9F0 and shadow update logic in lbShadow_8000F38C. The PR body reports checkdiff scores of 95.80645% and 99.69586%, and the bot report shows unmatched-item improvements for both functions.

key_files.role: Only changed source file; contains matching edits for lbShadow_8000E9F0, lbShadow_8000F38C, and a new local inline lbShadow_Sqrtf helper.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Functions list and verification commands

what_changed.text: lbShadow_8000E9F0 now preserves the original spline parameter in orig_u before scaling u by spline->numcv - 1, and case 0 compares orig_u against 1.0F before adjusting idx.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added f32 orig_u; orig_u = u; u *= spline->numcv - 1; if (orig_u == 1.0F)

what_changed.text: lbShadow_8000E9F0 rewrote one Bezier tangent expression from -((4.0F * t) - 1.0F) to 1.0F - (4.0F * t), with assignment order changed around t2.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: case 1 bez1 expression and t2 ordering

what_changed.text: Added static inline lbShadow_Sqrtf using __frsqrte refinement, static f64 constants, a local 0x38 byte zeroed array, and volatile f32 y, then replaced the prior conditional sqrtf call in lbShadow_8000F38C.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static inline f32 lbShadow_Sqrtf(f32 x)

what_changed.text: lbShadow_8000F38C changed stack padding from PAD_STACK(0x48) to PAD_STACK(0x10) and widened several locals to outer function scope: nextGx, hasObj, i, and shadow2.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added HSD_GObj* nextGx; s32 hasObj; s32 i; HSD_Shadow* shadow2

what_changed.text: lbShadow_8000F38C adjusted local declaration and assignment shape in several blocks, including reusing nextGx, hasObj, shadow2, and i, reordering upVec assignments, and introducing a temporary HSD_JObj* jobj for HSD_ShadowAddObject.

smart_moves.text: Preserved the unscaled spline parameter separately as orig_u so endpoint logic could still test the caller's original u value while allowing scaled u to drive idx and t.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: orig_u = u; u *= spline->numcv - 1; if (orig_u == 1.0F)

smart_moves.text: Localized a math-codegen workaround into an inline helper rather than spreading the __frsqrte refinement sequence at the call site.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added lbShadow_Sqrtf and replaced conditional sqrtf block

smart_moves.text: Changed local lifetime and declaration placement narrowly inside the touched function, which coincides with a reported checkdiff improvement for lbShadow_8000F38C.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: widened nextGx, hasObj, i, shadow2 locals

decomp_lessons.text: When a parameter is both transformed for indexing and still needed for endpoint behavior, preserving the original value in a separate local can improve matching while keeping the source intent readable.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: orig_u added and used for endpoint comparison
text_corpus issue_comment: lbShadow_8000E9F0 improved from 93.27% to 95.81%

decomp_lessons.text: For MWCC matching, algebraically equivalent float expressions and assignment ordering can matter; the PR changed bez1 from a negated subtraction form to 1.0F - (4.0F * t) and moved it after t2.

Local lifetime and declaration scope can affect matching in large update functions; this PR moved several block-local temporaries to the outer function scope in lbShadow_8000F38C alongside a reported score improvement.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: nextGx, hasObj, i, shadow2 moved to outer declaration list
text_corpus issue_comment: lbShadow_8000F38C improved from 99.15% to 99.70%

naming_conventions.name: orig_u
naming_conventions.text: Used for the original unscaled u parameter after u is repurposed as the scaled spline coordinate.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: f32 orig_u; orig_u = u; if (orig_u == 1.0F)

naming_conventions.name: lbShadow_Sqrtf
naming_conventions.text: File-local helper name uses the lbShadow_ prefix and describes the sqrtf replacement used by lbShadow_8000F38C.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static inline f32 lbShadow_Sqrtf(f32 x)

naming_conventions.name: nextGx
naming_conventions.text: Camel-case local corresponding to the next_gx field value from HSD_GObj.

naming_conventions.name: jobj
naming_conventions.text: Short role name for an HSD_JObj* temporary passed to HSD_ShadowAddObject.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Used PAD_STACK, but reduced the explicit padding in lbShadow_8000F38C from 0x48 to 0x10 while adding a custom sqrt helper with its own local padding.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: PAD_STACK and dummy padding are matching tactics that should remain tied to narrow objdiff/checkdiff evidence.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Replaced library sqrtf call shape with an inline __frsqrte Newton-refinement sequence and a volatile f32 return temporary.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: This evidence supports that the tactic was used in this PR, not that it is a general replacement for sqrtf.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Adjusted local variable lifetimes by hoisting temporaries to the function-level declaration list.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: nextGx, hasObj, i, shadow2 added near top of lbShadow_8000F38C
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Useful as a matching tactic candidate only when backed by local checkdiff evidence.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Used expression reshaping and assignment order changes for float math in spline tangent calculation.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: bez1 and t2 ordering changes
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Do not infer semantic change beyond the shown algebraic source rewrite and reported matching improvement.

review_feedback.text: decomp-dev[bot] reported two improvements in unmatched items for GALE01: lbShadow_8000E9F0 improved by +22 bytes from 93.27% to 95.81%, and lbShadow_8000F38C improved by +9 bytes from 99.15% to 99.70%.
evidence_refs: text_corpus issue_comment: Report for GALE01, 2 improvements in unmatched items

follow_up_queries: lbShadow_8000F38C PAD_STACK local lifetime nextGx hasObj shadow2

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR #2501 title, author, merged_at, changed_files counts

notes: The loaded slice includes the full raw diff and PR body, enough to identify file-level changes and matching tactics.
There were no loaded human review comments or review records; review_feedback is limited to the bot report.
Verification commands and percentage scores are PR-reported and bot-reported; no independent build or objdiff was run during intake.
The PR was merged according to metadata, but intake does not infer broader acceptance of all tactics as standards.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Preserve original parameter when reused scaled value changes endpoint behavior
accepted_candidate_records.text: In lbShadow_8000E9F0, the PR introduced orig_u before scaling u for spline indexing, then used orig_u for the endpoint check. This is a reusable matching pattern when the original argument and transformed coordinate both affect codegen or behavior.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: orig_u addition and endpoint comparison

accepted_candidate_records.title: Float expression spelling and assignment order can be material to MWCC matching
accepted_candidate_records.text: The PR changed a Bezier tangent expression from -((4.0F * t) - 1.0F) to 1.0F - (4.0F * t) and reordered nearby assignments in a function whose checkdiff score improved.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Local lifetime hoisting was used for lbShadow_8000F38C matching
accepted_candidate_records.text: The PR hoisted nextGx, hasObj, i, and shadow2 to the outer local declaration area in lbShadow_8000F38C, alongside a reported checkdiff improvement. Treat as a narrow tactic requiring verifier evidence, not general style.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: outer declarations and removed block-local declarations

source_update_candidates.title: Document lbshadow-local sqrt matching helper if it remains in current source
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2501 added a file-local lbShadow_Sqrtf helper using __frsqrte refinement, static f64 constants, local padding, and volatile f32 y to replace a conditional sqrtf call in lbShadow_8000F38C. Curator may want a source-owned note near lbshadow or a path-specific tactic entry if this helper remains relevant.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: added static inline f32 lbShadow_Sqrtf
source_update_candidates.reason: The helper is a concrete PR tactic, but broader guidance about custom sqrt/frsqrte helpers belongs in source/path documentation rather than being promoted globally from one PR.

source_update_candidates.title: Consider adding this PR as an example under matching-tactics evidence requirements
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2501 is a useful example of PAD_STACK, dummy local padding, volatile local, expression spelling, and local-lifetime edits being tied to narrow checkdiff-reported improvements. It could be referenced as an example, not as a blanket endorsement of those tactics.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: PAD_STACK and local lifetime changes
raw_diff: u8 _[0x38] and volatile f32 y
source_update_candidates.reason: The loaded standards already require evidence for these tactics; this PR may serve as a concrete case study if curator wants examples.

rejection_notes: Do not promote lbShadow_Sqrtf or __frsqrte refinement as a general sqrtf replacement; the evidence only shows a lbshadow-local matching edit.
Do not infer human reviewer approval or rationale beyond merge metadata and the absence of loaded review comments.
Do not treat PAD_STACK, dummy byte arrays, or volatile locals as accepted style; standards require narrow verification evidence.
Do not claim full function matches: the PR body reports 95.80645% for lbShadow_8000E9F0 and 99.69586% for lbShadow_8000F38C, not 100%.
